messages.speaker: V
messages.text: ok i think? the panel was rough though. one guy kept asking weird hypotheticals

messages.speaker: S
messages.text: ugh i hate that. like just ask normal questions

messages.speaker: V
messages.text: right? anyway, told my mom about you finally

messages.speaker: S
messages.text: OH GOD what did she say

messages.speaker: V
messages.text: lol she's chill, she said she wants to meet u next time she visits

messages.speaker: S
messages.text: ok that's actually so nice. i'll bring her tea she likes the fancy kind right

messages.speaker: S
messages.text: ok one more thing then i'll let u sleep. did u book the dog sitter for when ur gone

messages.speaker: V
messages.text: shoot no. i'll do it tomorrow morning. remind me
